prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `83b6b474`.
codex_response:
Implemented `83b6b474` as a border-reassembly task package. The rule is: each non-background input object is a disconnected horizontal/vertical/corner border segment, and the output is the smallest square-ish compact rectangle whose perimeter can be exactly reconstructed from those pieces on the background color. I used the Opus hint as the working hypothesis and discarded the Sonnet hint because it described vague cropping rather than perimeter assembly; that note is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_83b6b474/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed in `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

The implementation is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_83b6b474/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_83b6b474/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_83b6b474/generator.py#L4). The verifier classifies each piece as a line/corner fragment and searches for a valid perimeter packing; the generator builds on-family square border cases in three official-style templates, then scatters the fragments into a larger background grid.

Validation passed end to end: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 83b6b474` gave `3/3` official examples, `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 83b6b474 --n-examples 1000` built the artifacts, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 83b6b474` gave `1000/1000` generated examples passed. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/83b6b474/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/83b6b474/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/83b6b474/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/83b6b474/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/83b6b474/previews/preview_03.png). I also checked a generated preview visually; the distribution looks consistent with the official family.
